title: Climate change and mental health report
body: "This report provides an update on the evidence base of the mental health impacts from climate change and adverse weather that the UK is currently facing and will likely experience in future.  An assessment of confidence in the evidence has been applied to help readers understand the level of confidence around the statements.  The report consists of:   the full report a summary of the report for policymakers Appendix 1 - provides additional methodology including search strategies, screening criteria and critical appraisal Appendix 2 - provides additional information regarding the confidence assessment Appendix 3 - details responses to the call for case studies and links to resources Appendix 4 - a glossary of terms used in the report   To further explore the pathways between climate change and mental health, visit the climate change and mental health collection.  "
